chapter_title.en: The Dislike of Sleeping After the Fajr Prayer

text: 1452 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ جَلَسَ فِي مُصَلاَّهُ مِنْ صَلاَةِ اَلْفَجْرِ إِلَى طُلُوعِ اَلشَّمْسِ سَتَرَهُ اَللَّهُ مِنَ اَلنَّارِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1452 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever remains seated in their place of prayer after the Fajr prayer until the sun rises, Allah (swt) will protect them from the Fire."
